featured.title: Browser-ready agents and organized sessions
featured.description: Browser tools for agents reach general availability, the integrated browser adds per-site permissions, and you can group and reorder sessions in the Agents window.

highlights.title: Learn VS Code
highlights.description: Build your skills with structured training modules with hands-on exercises and real-world examples.

highlights.title: Optimize your AI usage
highlights.description: Tips to help you get the most out of AI agents, while optimizing for cost and performance.

highlights.title: Iterating faster with TypeScript 7
highlights.description: How the VS Code and TypeScript teams collaborated to adopt TypeScript 7, speeding up builds and improving the day-to-day editing loop for both developers and agents.
